HEXTECH_RUNES_SUBCATEGORY: [gold]Hextech:[/gold] Custom relics from the Hextech rune pool.
HEXTECH_FORGES_SUBCATEGORY: [gold]Stat Forgers:[/gold] Custom relics from the stat forging system.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.IRONCLAD: [gold]Ironclad Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Ironclad.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.SILENT: [gold]Silent Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Silent.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.REGENT: [gold]Regent Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Regent.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.DEFECT: [gold]Defect Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Defect.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.NECROBINDER: [gold]Necrobinder Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Necrobinder.
HEXTECH_WAITING_FOR_PLAYERS: Waiting for other players to choose...
HEXTECH_MAP_PREVIEW_HINT: Hex not selected yet — close the map to continue choosing.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_BUTTON_TOOLTIP: Configure the Hextech, enemy hex, and stat forger rules used when playing solo or hosting multiplayer.
HEXTECH_PLAYER_COUNT_DESCRIPTION: Each number is how many Hextech runes each player chooses in that act, from 0 to 6. In multiplayer, every player uses the host's config locked in at run start.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_COUNT_DESCRIPTION: Each number is how many enemy hexes enemies gain in that act. Solo runs use your local config. In multiplayer, the host's config is locked in when the run starts. Changes take effect from the next run.
HEXTECH_REROLL_LIMIT_DESCRIPTION: Maximum rerolls for each option. The range is 0-9; increasing past 9 sets it to unlimited. Multiplayer uses the host's run-start config.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_CLIENT_READONLY: This multiplayer run uses the host's config snapshot from run start. Local changes saved here apply only next time you play solo or host.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_COUNT_CLIENT_READONLY: This multiplayer run uses the host's per-act enemy hex gains from run start. Your local changes will only apply when you host or play solo next run.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_DESCRIPTION: Click an icon to enable or disable it; touch and hold to inspect. Solo uses local config. Multiplayer uses the host's run-start snapshot for every setting. Changes take effect next run.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_POOL_HINT: Click an icon to enable or disable it; touch and hold to inspect. Disabled entries are dimmed. Changes take effect next run.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_MISC_HINT: Adjust rarity weights, shop price, and interface options. Changes take effect next run.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_SUMMARY: Enabled: player hexes {0}/{1}, enemy hexes {2}/{3}, forgers {4}/{5}.
HEXTECH_SHOW_HIDDEN_RELICS_TOGGLE_DESCRI: When enabled, a hide-UI checkbox appears in the lower-left corner during gameplay. When checked, it hides the relic bar and multiplayer player state panel to keep the left side clear.
HEXTECH_RARITY_WEIGHTS_DESCRIPTION: Relative draw weight per rarity. Each row is normalized independently; the percentage shows the resulting draw chance.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_REMOVED_DESCRIPTION: No new enemy hex will be added for this act.
